project: AI Webinar Platform - Admin Dashboard & Progress Tracking
description: Add admin dashboard for tracking user progress and controlling lesson access, plus enhance the My Progress page for all users.

userStories.title: Add is_admin column to profiles and update AuthContext
userStories.description: As an admin, I need the is_admin field to be available in the auth context so admin features can be conditionally shown.
acceptanceCriteria: Add is_admin column to profiles table via Supabase migration SQL
Update AuthContext.jsx to fetch and expose isAdmin boolean from profiles table
isAdmin defaults to false for users without the field set
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: SQL: ALTER TABLE profiles ADD COLUMN is_admin boolean DEFAULT false; Then update src/context/AuthContext.jsx

userStories.title: Create blocked_lessons table
userStories.description: As an admin, I need a blocked_lessons table to store which lessons are globally blocked.
acceptanceCriteria: Create blocked_lessons table with: id (uuid), lesson_id (integer unique), blocked_at (timestamp), blocked_by (uuid references auth.users)
Enable RLS on blocked_lessons table
Create policy allowing anyone to SELECT (read blocked status)
Create policy allowing all operations (admin check in app logic)
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: SQL migration to create table with RLS policies

userStories.title: Add Admin Dashboard menu item to UserMenu
userStories.description: As an admin, I want to see an Admin Dashboard link in the user menu dropdown.
acceptanceCriteria: Add 'Admin Dashboard' menu item in UserMenu.jsx
Menu item only visible when user.isAdmin is true
Clicking navigates to admin page via setCurrentPage('admin')
Uses Shield or similar admin icon from Lucide
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
userStories.notes: Modify src/components/auth/UserMenu.jsx, conditional rendering based on isAdmin

userStories.title: Create useAdminData hook for fetching admin data
userStories.description: As a developer, I need a hook to fetch all users with their progress data.
acceptanceCriteria: Create src/hooks/useAdminData.js hook
Hook fetches all profiles from Supabase
Hook fetches lesson_progress for all users
Hook fetches quiz_results for all users
Returns: users array, loading state, error state
Each user object includes: name, email, lessonsCompleted, lastActive, quizScores
Max 150 lines
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Create AdminDashboard page with user list
userStories.description: As an admin, I want to see a dashboard with a list of all users and their progress.
acceptanceCriteria: Create src/pages/AdminDashboard.jsx (max 300 lines)
Add admin page route in App.jsx
Shows table/cards of all users using useAdminData hook
Each user shows: name, email, lessons completed count, last active date
Shows loading spinner while fetching
Responsive design for desktop
Non-admins redirected to dashboard
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
userStories.notes: New file: src/pages/AdminDashboard.jsx, update App.jsx routing

userStories.title: Create UserProgressDetail component for admin view
userStories.description: As an admin, I want to see detailed progress when I click on a user.
acceptanceCriteria: Create src/components/admin/UserProgressDetail.jsx (max 250 lines)
Shows each lesson status with visual progress bar
Shows quiz scores for each completed lesson
Expandable/collapsible from user list
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Create useBlockedLessons hook
userStories.description: As a developer, I need a hook to fetch and manage blocked lessons.
acceptanceCriteria: Create src/hooks/useBlockedLessons.js hook (max 80 lines)
Hook fetches blocked_lessons from Supabase
Returns: blockedLessons array, isLessonBlocked(lessonId) function, blockLesson(lessonId), unblockLesson(lessonId)
blockLesson and unblockLesson update Supabase
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Create LessonBlockManager component for admin
userStories.description: As an admin, I want to block/unblock lessons globally from the admin dashboard.
acceptanceCriteria: Create src/components/admin/LessonBlockManager.jsx (max 200 lines)
Shows all 9 lessons with toggle switches
Toggle to block/unblock each lesson
Blocked lessons show lock icon
Uses useBlockedLessons hook
Changes saved to Supabase immediately
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Integrate blocked lessons into Dashboard
userStories.description: As a user, I cannot access blocked lessons even if I completed previous ones.
acceptanceCriteria: Update Dashboard.jsx to use useBlockedLessons hook
Update isLessonUnlocked to check blocked_lessons table
Blocked lessons show as locked regardless of user progress
Clicking blocked lesson shows toast/message 'This lesson is not yet available'
Works alongside existing unlock logic (unblocked AND previous completed)
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Create MyProgress page with overview stats
userStories.description: As a user, I want to see my learning progress on a dedicated page.
acceptanceCriteria: Create src/pages/MyProgress.jsx (max 350 lines)
Add 'My Progress' to UserMenu.jsx navigation
Add progress page route in App.jsx
Shows overview stats: lessons completed count, total progress %, quiz average score
Visual journey map showing completed lessons with checkmarks
Accessible for all authenticated users
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
userStories.notes: New file: src/pages/MyProgress.jsx, update UserMenu.jsx and App.jsx

userStories.title: Create LessonProgressCard component
userStories.description: As a user, I want to see what I learned in each lesson on my progress page.
acceptanceCriteria: Create src/components/progress/LessonProgressCard.jsx (max 150 lines)
Each completed lesson shows key takeaways
Quiz score displayed per lesson
'Review Lesson' button to go back to that lesson
Locked/incomplete lessons shown with different styling
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Create QuizHistory component
userStories.description: As a user, I want to see my quiz results history on my progress page.
acceptanceCriteria: Create src/components/progress/QuizHistory.jsx (max 150 lines)
Shows all quiz attempts from quiz_results table
Each entry shows: score, date, pass/fail status
Fetches data from Supabase quiz_results
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Ensure quiz results save to Supabase
userStories.description: As a developer, I need to verify quizzes save results to Supabase correctly.
acceptanceCriteria: Verify Quiz.jsx or QuizTime components call saveQuizResult
Results saved to quiz_results table with: user_id, lesson_id, score, total_questions, completed_at
Check/create useQuizResults hook if needed
All lesson quizzes save results correctly
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Check src/components/lesson/Quiz.jsx and lesson QuizTime sections

userStories.title: Final integration testing and polish
userStories.description: As a user, I want all admin and progress features to work smoothly together.
acceptanceCriteria: Admin dashboard accessible only to admins
User list shows correct progress data
Lesson blocking works from admin and enforces on user dashboard
My Progress page shows accurate stats and history
All navigation works correctly
Design matches existing design system (purple/blue gradients, glassmorphism)
Dev server runs without errors: npm run dev
Build succeeds: npm run build
